Text.Page:
The Scions stole Lilyenne from her home. We don't know if her parents are alive, and I'd like to keep her mind off such possibilities.

Find {@LinkCreature:225#1016$$Heleid} at {@Rgn:24013$$Cathedral Redoubt}. See if he has something that might pass for a toy.

A toy? Here? Doron clearly didn't think this through.

Maybe you can find something in all those crates at the {@Rgn:24012$$Crusader Camp}.
(A tangled mess of mixed tools fill this crate.)
(Dusty pot shards and ancient relics fill this crate.)
(Improbably, you find a small bag full of cookies.)

Woohoo! Cookies! Oh, I love cookies. They look so yummy!

Thank you!
There's nothing to do here. Where's Mommy?
A smile on a child's face is balm indeed to a troubled heart. Thank you, <PCNAME>.
